description: Copy or formulary of a letter in Judaeo-Arabic, damaged, almost entirely consisting of honorifics and praises. Might name somebody titled Zayn al-Dīn (unless that is just another term of respect for the recipient). Previous description (unclear which shelfmark this belongs to): Commentary on Isaiah 34:10. In Judaeo-Arabic. Information from CUDL.
description_he: העתק או נוסח של מכתב ביהודית-ערבית; פגום; כמעט כולו שבחים ותארים; ייתכן מזכיר מישהו בתואר זין אל-דין
